criteria.name: Cleaning Config
criteria.evidence: docs/cleaning-config.json exists but has multiple mismatches with spec Section Deliverables 1: (1) air_temperature_c range is [-60.0, 60.0] but spec says [-50.0, 60.0]; (2) relative_humidity_pct range is [0.0, 100.0] but spec says [0.0, 105.0]; (3) FWI output ranges for dmc/dc/isi/bui/fwi have finite upper bounds (300/1500/100/300/200) but spec says null (no upper limit); (4) enforcement.actions only has flatline entry, missing out_of_range/fwi_out_of_range/cross_variable/rate_of_change entries that spec defines; (5) cross_variable_checks.rain_rh_correlation missing enabled/rule/variables/threshold_rh fields from spec.

criteria.name: enforce_quality() Function
criteria.evidence: quality.py exists and is well-structured with enforce_quality(), enforce_fwi_outputs(), truncate_date_range(). However cross-variable check hardcodes action=flagged (line ~165) instead of reading from config enforcement.actions which spec says should be set_nan for cross_variable. The implementation does not consult the enforcement config block to determine per-check-type actions.

criteria.name: Pipeline Integration
criteria.evidence: enforce_quality() is not imported or called anywhere in the pipeline code. grep of src/pea_met_network/ (excluding quality.py) shows zero references to enforce_quality, enforce_fwi_outputs, or truncate_date_range.

criteria.name: FWI Output Enforcement
criteria.evidence: enforce_fwi_outputs() exists in quality.py but is not wired into the pipeline after calculate_fwi(). No import or call found outside quality.py.

criteria.name: Quality Enforcement Report
criteria.evidence: No quality_enforcement_report.csv generation. The actions list from enforce_quality() is returned but never written to a CSV artifact. No code produces data/processed/quality_enforcement_report.csv.

criteria.name: Manifest Registration
criteria.evidence: quality_enforcement_report is not registered in the pipeline manifest. Depends on AC-DQ-5.

criteria.name: Quality Flags Column
criteria.evidence: enforce_quality() correctly adds _quality_flags column as JSON-encoded string of flag arrays. 51/54 tests pass including TestQualityFlagsColumn tests.

criteria.name: QA/QC Report Enhancement
criteria.evidence: QA/QC report does not include quality_enforced_count, quality_flagged_count, out_of_range_pre_enforcement, or out_of_range_post_enforcement columns. No changes to qa_qc.py for Phase 8.

criteria.name: Date Range Truncation
criteria.evidence: truncate_date_range() exists in quality.py but is not called anywhere in the pipeline. No import found outside quality.py.

criteria.name: Fast Test Suite Passes
criteria.evidence: 226 passed, 3 failed, 1 skipped, 9 deselected (e2e). 3 failures are in test_quality_enforcement.py — all Martin test-design bugs: (1) test_clean_data_passes_through_unchanged uses 24 identical values triggering flatline detection; (2) test_flatline_does_not_modify_values has wind_speed_kmh list of 15 elements vs 8-row DataFrame (construction error); (3) test_flatline_with_nan_gap has NaN gap only in temperature but 7 identical values for RH and wind triggering flatline.

criteria.name: No Out-of-Range FWI Inputs
criteria.evidence: enforce_quality() is not wired into the pipeline (AC-DQ-3 FAIL), so out-of-range values still reach calculate_fwi(). The function exists but is never called.

criteria.name: Flatline Detection
criteria.evidence: Flatline detection correctly uses flag_only action — does not modify values, only adds quality flags. Implementation correctly resets run_length on NaN gaps. 8/9 flatline-specific tests pass.

failing_nodes.message: Value range mismatches with spec: air_temperature_c [-60,60] should be [-50,60]; relative_humidity_pct [0,100] should be [0,105]. FWI output ranges have finite upper bounds where spec says null. enforcement.actions missing entries for out_of_range, fwi_out_of_range, cross_variable, rate_of_change. cross_variable_checks.rain_rh_correlation missing spec-required fields (enabled, rule, variables, threshold_rh).
Cross-variable check hardcodes action=flagged instead of reading from config enforcement.actions. Spec says cross_variable action should be set_nan.
Module not integrated into pipeline. enforce_quality(), enforce_fwi_outputs(), truncate_date_range() are never imported or called outside quality.py. AC-DQ-3,4,9,11 all depend on pipeline wiring.
No quality enforcement report generation. enforce_quality() returns actions list but nothing writes it to data/processed/quality_enforcement_report.csv. AC-DQ-5,6.
enforce_quality() does not consult enforcement config block to determine per-check-type actions. Actions are hardcoded per check function rather than driven by config.

Martin test-design bug: sample_hourly fixture uses 24 identical values for all 3 flatline-monitored variables, causing flatline detection to fire in test_clean_data_passes_through_unchanged. Fixture needs variation in at least some values.
Martin test-design bug: wind_speed_kmh has 15 elements but DataFrame has 8 rows (periods=8). Causes ValueError on construction.

Martin test-design bug: test_flatline_with_nan_gap puts NaN gap only in temperature (3 values + NaN + 3 values = 7, below threshold 6) but RH and wind have 7 identical values triggering flatline. All 3 flatline variables need the NaN gap.

summary: Ralph made solid progress — quality.py is well-structured with enforce_quality(), enforce_fwi_outputs(), and truncate_date_range() all functional. 51/54 tests pass. However three categories of issues remain: (1) cleaning-config.json has multiple mismatches with the spec (value ranges, FWI upper bounds, enforcement actions, cross-variable fields); (2) nothing is wired into the pipeline — the three functions exist in isolation with zero imports elsewhere; (3) no quality enforcement report generation or manifest registration. The 3 test failures are all Martin test-design bugs (fixture uses constant values triggering flatline, wrong list length, incomplete NaN gap). Ralph should fix config spec compliance, wire all three functions into the pipeline, add report generation, and the 3 test bugs are for Martin to fix.
